title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
